title: nasturtium flavum
intro: Nasturtium flavum, also known as the yellow flowered nasturtium, is a species of flowering plant in the cress family (Brassicaceae) and is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Nasturtium flavum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of isothiocyanates and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of consuming Nasturtium flavum include its ability to support the immune system and reduce the risk of certain cancers, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders and respiratory conditions. Nasturtium flavum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
